commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  registered as EJECUTOR in ipr_party for GLOSA06 mechanism IPRs

Total: 317 tests (313 pass + 4 skip), 17 gate functions.

commit.message:
fix: quantize vertex positions for reliable smooth normal grouping

Dictionary<Vector3> uses exact float equality, so FBX vertices at the
same position but with tiny float differences were not grouped. Now
snaps positions to a 0.0001 grid before hashing, ensuring all vertices
at the same visual position share the same averaged smooth normal.

Fix torch.compile + resume: load checkpoint before compile, save raw model

torch.compile wraps parameter keys with _orig_mod. prefix, breaking
checkpoint loading. Fix: resume → compile → optimizer (not compile → resume).
Also save raw model state_dict to keep checkpoints compile-agnostic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct starfield PRNG bias and perspective distortion

The LCG-based PRNG used a y-multiplier (214013) too small to wrap u32
for seeds 0-499, causing all particles to cluster at y≈-1.0 (top of
screen). Replace with a proper integer hash (xorshift + multiply) for
uniform distribution. Also use a uniform focal length in the perspective
projection so stars radiate symmetrically regardless of terminal shape.

ॐ walking NPCs: Mixamo→VRM retargeting, animation state machine

VRM avatars placed as NPCs now walk when given a move target (RTS click-to-move).

- Added MIXAMO_TO_VRM bone name mapping table (44 bones including fingers)
- Added retargetClipForVRM() — bridges Mixamo FBX animations to VRM humanoid
  skeleton by mapping normalized Mixamo names to VRM standard bone names
- VRMCatalogRenderer now has:
  - AnimationMixer on the VRM scene
  - Auto-loads walk clip from animation library on mount
  - Retargets walk to VRM bones
  - 3-priority state machine: behavior animation > walk-during-move > idle
  - Supports all ObjectInspector animations (dance, combat, etc.)
  - Expressions + spring bones continue alongside skeletal animation

commit.message:
fix: wrap blocking get_device_info_list in executor for HA 2026.3+

HA 2026.3.0 on Python 3.14 raises RuntimeError when sync requests
calls happen inside the async event loop. The tplink-cloud-api library's
get_devices() is async but internally calls get_device_info_list() which
uses the blocking requests library. This wraps that call in
async_add_executor_job to prevent blocking the event loop.

  CLAUDE.md and agent-integration.md (the block users copy into their projects)
- Resolve /tmp/ paths to OS temp directory on Windows so the redirect-to-file
  pattern works cross-platform without manual path adjustment

commit.message:
Add Person, WebSite, and BreadcrumbList structured data

Shadow the theme SEO component to inject JSON-LD schemas:
- Person schema with name, job title, skills, social links, employer
- WebSite schema with site metadata
- BreadcrumbList schema with dynamic breadcrumbs per page

disable scroll restoration so page always starts at top on mobile refresh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Round strategy toggle pills — no sharp angles per UI guidelines

- Changed border-radius from 4px to 100px (full pill shape)
- Slightly wider padding (10px horizontal) for comfortable pill proportions
- Cleaner dot indicator (6px, no box-shadow glow)
- ALL/NONE action buttons match pill shape
- Increased gap between pills (6px) for breathing room
- All data logic untouched, layout unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Wires up DynamicSlotsPanel and slot management (add/update/remove/fetch)
to the Template Builder, matching Scene Composer functionality.
